segments.caption: The video opens with a black screen before transitioning to a man standing behind a table filled with computer hardware boxes against a vibrant blue background. He is wearing a dark t-shirt and speaks directly to the camera, gesturing toward the components. The boxes include a Gigabyte AORUS B650 motherboard, an AMD Ryzen 7 CPU, an ASUS ROG Strix GeForce RTX 4090, a Corsair H100i RGB Platinum liquid cooler, a Seasonic PRIME 850W power supply, and a white PC case wrapped in plastic. He picks up the RTX 4090 box, then the AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX box, and places them back down while continuing to speak. The scene cuts to a fully assembled white PC with RGB lighting, showcasing a clean, modern build with a liquid cooler and multiple fans. The video then returns to the man with the components, where he gestures toward the boxes again. Brief gameplay footage is shown: first, a racing game with a white car on a rainy track, then a first-person shooter in a desert environment. The video ends with the man back at the table, smiling and gesturing toward the components, with on-screen text briefly displaying 'be building' and '2000'.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up, dynamic shot of the interior of the Assembled White PC, highlighting the ASRock TAICHI WHITE Radeon RX 7900 XTX GPU with its white casing, RGB lighting, and neatly bundled white cables, all illuminated by vibrant blue and multicolor internal lighting. The camera pans across the clean, organized build, emphasizing the white Montech fans and the sleek design of the components. The scene then transitions to a medium shot of the Man seated at a black desk in a minimalist studio with a white background and vertical light bars on either side. He is wearing a white t-shirt and has a small microphone clipped to his collar. He gestures expressively with his hands as he speaks, occasionally pointing toward the Assembled White PC to his left, which remains illuminated with internal RGB lighting. His demeanor is engaging and enthusiastic, suggesting he is explaining or reviewing the PC build. The lighting is bright and even, creating a clean, professional atmosphere. Throughout the segment, the Man maintains eye contact with the camera, using hand movements to emphasize his points, while the Assembled White PC serves as a constant visual anchor, showcasing its aesthetic and technical design.

segments.caption: The video opens with a young man in a white t-shirt seated at a black desk in a minimalist studio with white walls and vertical light bars, presenting the Assembled White PC. He gestures expressively while speaking, introducing the build. The scene transitions to a close-up of the White PC Case: Montech King 95 Pro, now illuminated with vibrant blue RGB lighting, showcasing its internal components including the G.SKILL Ripjaws S5 DDR5 RAM, ASRock TAICHI WHITE Radeon RX 7900 XTX GPU, and white Montech fans. A hand removes the transparent side panel, revealing the clean cable management and internal layout. The camera pans around the case, highlighting the Enermax Aquafusion ADX liquid cooler, modular cables, and the Montech branding on the front I/O panel. The video then cuts to gameplay footage of a racing game, showing a white Bentley race car on a rainy track with real-time performance metrics (FPS 92–113, GPU 65–67°C) and an inset of the man reacting. The scene returns to the man at the desk, who continues his presentation, with the Assembled White PC beside him. The lighting shifts to a blue hue, emphasizing the RGB effects, and text appears on screen: 'Links in the description'. The man concludes with a smile, hands clasped, as the video ends.
